source_policy: Workbook/extracted/report sources only. External simulator websites are not used.
simplified_assumptions: source-confirmed Seraphic Duet Tune Rupture follow-up uses existing tune_response base-10000 formula path

seraphic_duet_followups.label: 强化E-震谐
seraphic_duet_followups.name: Seraphic Duet Tune Rupture Follow-up
confirmed_source_facts: action rows 2786 and 2931 confirm normal follow-up repeat_count 5 and hit_interval_frames 4
dmg rows 2578 and 2628 confirm RateLv_10 10935, runtime multiplier 1.0935, Damage.Type 12, and RelatedProperty 10000099
seraphic_duet_followups.notes: Do not apply normal elemental/category bonuses or Everbright modifiers. Current target damage-taken amp may apply through the tune_response formula path.

seraphic_duet_followups.label: 强化E-震谐增幅
seraphic_duet_followups.name: Seraphic Duet Tune Rupture Enhanced Follow-up
confirmed_source_facts: action rows 2787 and 2932 confirm enhanced follow-up repeat_count 10 and hit_interval_frames 2
dmg rows 2579 and 2629 confirm RateLv_10 10935, runtime multiplier 1.0935, Damage.Type 12, and RelatedProperty 10000099
seraphic_duet_followups.notes: Enhanced variant is selected by forte_enhancement_stacks, not directly by Stardust Resonance. Do not bake Interfered Marker into this source multiplier.
